name: Symal Group Limited
analysis: SYL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.8700. Trade idea: entry A$3.0800, stop A$2.4948, target A$3.3944 (0.54:1) — then trail it.
